_publications._publicationTitle: Icariin Promotes Osteogenic Differentiation in a Cell Model with NF1 Gene Knockout by Activating the cAMP/PKA/CREB Pathway.

_contextSnippet: both NF1 knockout cell lines 2−7 and 2−12 showed decreased ALP activity at different time points of osteogenic differentiation compared with the control cells
details: NF1 knockout C2C12 cells showed decreased ALP activity and lighter/smaller ALP staining compared to control cells during osteogenic differentiation
